title: 敦煌市博物馆｜非官方网站概念提案
summary: A five-route cultural brand experience with a full-viewport mural portal, route-specific composition families, live art type, authored controls, and direct accessible interactions.
interactionInventory: shared route navigation with active state
keyboard-operable mobile menu with Escape close and focus return
collection category filters and non-modal detail panel
digital-museum mode tabs and highlighted route node
visit-focus selector with changing preparation guidance

designFingerprint.visualThesis: A mineral-dark archive aperture opens onto a luminous Silk Road world, then releases into readable parchment fields without repeating one hero scaffold across routes.

typeRoles.art: Ma Shan Zheng for one dominant live art word per route
typeRoles.displayAndBody: Noto Serif SC and Songti fallbacks

designFingerprint.interactionRule: Input creates a clear route, selection, disclosure, or orientation consequence; ambient decoration is not required for completion.

truthBoundary.affiliation: Non-official concept; no institutional affiliation or endorsement is claimed.
truthBoundary.content: Exhibitions, collections, hours, locations, and services are concept copy rather than verified facts or available services.
truthBoundary.imagery: Original AI-generated concept imagery; not a reconstruction of a real mural, cave, artifact, building, or official identity.
truthBoundary.ownerAuthorization: The repository owner explicitly approved this final case for inclusion on 2026-07-14.

assets.role: home mural world and visit crop

knownLimitations: Front-end concept only; no backend, booking, search, or official data source.
Final runtime evidence is not bundled, so this case does not claim tested-golden or template maturity.
The static distribution is intended to be served from the local root with the included server.
